warnings: Reserve, custodian, redemption asset, and proof-of-reserves fields are not applicable for governance_protocol grading.
notes: CFG is classified as an RWA infrastructure governance token, not as a direct asset-backed RWA claim token.

The grade changed from research to analytics because the profile-aware engine now evaluates CFG using protocol, tokenomics, governance, liquidity, source, and risk evidence instead of reserve-heavy asset-backed requirements.
Reserve, custodian, redemption asset, and proof-of-reserves are treated as not_applicable, not as missing evidence.
This baseline should be displayed publicly as Analytics — Governance Protocol Profile, not simply as Analytics without context.
Database import currently stores reserveScore as 0 for Prisma compatibility, but JSON baseline keeps reserveScore as null to preserve semantic accuracy.
nextActions: Update frontend display so gradeContext, gradingProfile, claimType, and applicability are visible on asset cards/detail pages.
Map holder count and holder concentration from Etherscan or another reliable on-chain analytics source.
Map on-chain liquidity depth and major DEX/CEX markets before raising liquidity confidence.
Find exact token or protocol audit reports before raising smartContractRisk.
Migrate other governance/protocol tokens to the same classification standard before adding new assets.
